Sijil Dan Pengikhtirafan “SABAH MAJU JAYA” JABATAN PERKHIDMATAN KOMPUTER NEGERI // Import Firebase Modules import { initializeApp } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/11.4.0/firebase-app.js"; import { getFirestore, doc, getDoc, setDoc, runTransaction, serverTimestamp, onSnapshot } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/11.4.0/firebase-firestore.js"; // Firebase configuration const firebaseConfig = { apiKey: "AIzaSyAqpGN30mhbzGfy7oaNcpb0WNcWjgUUHhc", authDomain: "jpkn-website-visitors.firebaseapp.com", projectId: "jpkn-website-visitors", storageBucket: "jpkn-website-visitors.appspot.com",

= { apiKey: "AIzaSyAqpGN30mhbzGfy7oaNcpb0WNcWjgUUHhc", authDomain: "jpkn-website-visitors.firebaseapp.com", projectId: "jpkn-website-visitors", storageBucket: "jpkn-website-visitors.appspot.com", messagingSenderId: "765896329853", appId: "1:765896329853:web:5188de7834186d13d37f14" }; // Initialize Firebase const app = initializeApp(firebaseConfig); const db = getFirestore(app); // Function to calculate current date in MYT (Malaysia Time) function getMalaysiaDateString() { const now = new Date(); const malaysiaTime = new Date(now.getTime() + (8 * 60 * 60 * 1000)); return malaysiaTime.toISOString().split("T")[0]; } // Function to reset visitor stats /* async function resetAllVisitorStats() { const docRef = doc(db, "stats", "visitors"); const resetData = { todayVisitors: 0, totalVisitors: 0, totalHits: 0, lastUpdated: new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0] }; try { await setDoc(docRef, resetData); console.log("Visitor stats reset successfully."); } catch (error) { console.error("Error

0, totalHits: 0, lastUpdated: new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0] }; try { await setDoc(docRef, resetData); console.log("Visitor stats reset successfully."); } catch (error) { console.error("Error resetting visitor stats:", error); } } */ // Function to update visitor stats async function updateVisitorStats() { const docRef = doc(db, "stats", "visitors"); try { await runTransaction(db, async (transaction) => { const docSnap = await transaction.get(docRef); let data = docSnap.exists() ? docSnap.data() : { todayVisitors: 0, totalVisitors: 0, totalHits: 0, lastUpdated: getMalaysiaDateString() }; const today = getMalaysiaDateString(); // Reset daily counter if date has changed if (data.lastUpdated !== today) { data.todayVisitors = 0; data.lastUpdated = today; } // Count today's uniue visitor (once per day per browser) const visitedToday = localStorage.getItem("visitedToday"); if (visitedToday !== today) { data.todayVisitors++; localStorage.setItem("visitedToday", today); } // Check if

(once per day per browser) const visitedToday = localStorage.getItem("visitedToday"); if (visitedToday !== today) { data.todayVisitors++; localStorage.setItem("visitedToday", today); } // Check if the user is a unique visitor (across multiple days) const uniqueVisitorKey = `uniqueVisitor-${today}`; if (!localStorage.getItem(uniqueVisitorKey)) { data.totalVisitors++; localStorage.setItem(uniqueVisitorKey, "true"); } data.totalHits++; // Update Firestore transaction.set(docRef, data); }); } catch (error) { console.error("Error updating visitor stats:", error); } } // Function to format the date and time function formatDateTime(date) { let day = date.getDate().toString().padStart(2, '0'); let month = (date.getMonth() + 1).toString().padStart(2, '0'); let year = date.getFullYear(); let hours = date.getHours().toString().padStart(2, '0'); let minutes = date.getMinutes().toString().padStart(2, '0'); let seconds = date.getSeconds().toString().padStart(2, '0'); return `${day}/${month}/${year}

date.getHours().toString().padStart(2, '0'); let minutes = date.getMinutes().toString().padStart(2, '0'); let seconds = date.getSeconds().toString().padStart(2, '0'); return `${day}/${month}/${year} ${hours}:${minutes}:${seconds}`; } // Function to update last updated time in Firestore async function updateLastUpdatedTime() { const docRef = doc(db, "stats", "lastUpdated"); const newTime = new Date(); try { await setDoc(docRef, { timestamp: serverTimestamp() }, { merge: true }); document.getElementById("last-updated-time").textContent = formatDateTime(newTime); } catch (error) { console.error("Error updating last updated time:", error); } } // Function to fetch the last updated time from Firestore async function fetchLastUpdatedTime() { const docRef = doc(db, "stats", "lastUpdated"); try { const docSnap = await getDoc(docRef); if (docSnap.exists()) { const data = docSnap.data(); if (data.timestamp) { document.getElementById("last-updated-time").textContent =

"lastUpdated"); try { const docSnap = await getDoc(docRef); if (docSnap.exists()) { const data = docSnap.data(); if (data.timestamp) { document.getElementById("last-updated-time").textContent = formatDateTime(data.timestamp.toDate()); } } } catch (error) { console.error("Error fetching last updated time:", error); } } // Real-time listener for visitor stats onSnapshot(doc(db, "stats", "visitors"), (docSnap) => { if (docSnap.exists()) { let data = docSnap.data(); document.getElementById("today-visitors").textContent = data.todayVisitors; document.getElementById("total-visitors").textContent = data.totalVisitors; document.getElementById("total-hits").textContent = data.totalHits; } }); // Real-time listener for last updated time onSnapshot(doc(db, "stats", "lastUpdated"), (docSnap) => { if (docSnap.exists()) { const data = docSnap.data(); if (data.timestamp) { document.getElementById("last-updated-time").textContent = formatDateTime(data.timestamp.toDate()); } } }); // Run functions on

(docSnap.exists()) { const data = docSnap.data(); if (data.timestamp) { document.getElementById("last-updated-time").textContent = formatDateTime(data.timestamp.toDate()); } } }); // Run functions on page load document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => { // resetAllVisitorStats(); // Only use this when user want to reset the Pelawat Hari Ini/Jumlah Pelawat/Jumlah Capaian updateVisitorStats(); fetchLastUpdatedTime(); updateLastUpdatedTime(); }); Pelawat Hari Ini: 27 Jumlah Pelawat: 7694 Jumlah Capaian: 16658 Last updated: 15/07/2025 10:44:20 Dasar Privasi | Notis Penafian
